text: As I stand in this bright, modern space with smooth glass doors and vibrant exhibits, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean lines and reflections create a futuristic atmosphere, while the R+D wall hints at exploration and innovation. I am drawn to ponder how we, as humans, engage with technology and knowledge, and what it means to coexist with machines. There is an energy here—both calm and electric—that inspires me to reflect on progress and our place within it.
